purpose: Replace ambiguous headline use of the V0-V8 ladder with descriptive digital profiles and separate physical/witness dimensions.
design_rules: Report exact checks before reporting a profile.
Use the weakest profile that fully describes the claimed conclusion.
A strong finding for one component does not imply full-protocol coverage.
Physical observation and external witness are orthogonal dimensions, not higher digital levels.
Availability, integrity, key binding, timestamp and semantic truth are different claims.
Legacy V-levels remain compatibility metadata for existing schemas and records.

digital_profiles.name: Context only
digital_profiles.meaning: Materials were read or summarized, but no technical reference, byte, signature or timestamp check was performed.
digital_profiles.allowed_claim: I read the listed sources and have not independently verified them.

digital_profiles.name: Reference checked
digital_profiles.meaning: At least one primary or external reference was actually queried and its result reported.

digital_profiles.name: Integrity checked
digital_profiles.meaning: Declared bytes, hashes, signatures, proof objects or timestamp proofs were computed or cryptographically validated.

digital_profiles.name: Independent reproduction
digital_profiles.meaning: A material result was independently reproduced without merely trusting the project's official output or a copied report.

digital_profiles.name: Full public digital coverage
digital_profiles.meaning: All declared public digital target families were checked, unavailable targets were listed, and no physical or institutional conclusion was inferred from digital coverage.

values.meaning: Static public photographs, videos or public evidence package reviewed.
Live remote session observed with stated controls and limitations.
Verifier directly observed the object onsite and recorded custody/location limitations.
Documented instrument-assisted or specialist examination with reproducible methods.

physical_observation.rule: A physical observation value never automatically changes digital_profile.

values.meaning: A notarial act records a stated process, document, identity or date within its own scope.
A separately authored report with disclosed method and limitations.
An accountable institution signs or adopts a public/archived report that passes the formal admission gate.
A regulator or court record exists and its exact scope is stated.

external_witness.rule: Notarized evidence does not automatically count as formal independent attestation.

legacy_compatibility.policy: Existing V0-V8 and V4+ labels remain preserved in historical records. New public records use V0-V5 only as compatibility metadata and lead with the multidimensional verification claim model.
legacy_compatibility.important_boundary: V4+, V6, V7 and V8 are not accepted as new public legacy_v_level values. V6-V8 map only to separate physical observation states.
